{{Quote|That's the Harrier. My sons Peter and Dayvid are aboard it.|[[Sena Leikvold Midanyl]]|<ref name="The Last Command">''[[The Last Command]]''</ref>}}
'''''Harrier''''' was a [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]] under command of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

==History==
The ''Harrier'' was one of the six [[Katana fleet|''Katana'']] Dreadnaughts used by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]].

It was later part of the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] defense fleet by the time [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] attacked the planet using his camouflaged asteroids to block the system.

[[Peter Midanyl|Peter]] and [[Dayvid Midanyl]], sons of [[Sena Leikvold Midanyl]], served aboard the ''Harrier''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Force Rising]]'' {{Ab|Dark Force Rising (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
*''[[The Last Command]]'' {{Ab|The Last Command (unabridged audiobook)}}
